title: bob-ros2/bob_llm
description: This ROS 2 package provides a highly flexible node that acts as an interface to Large Language Models (LLMs). The bob_llm node connects to any OpenAI-compatible API, manages conversational history, and exposes a powerful, dynamically-loadable tool system that allows the LLM to interact with a robot's functions.

title: CODE-NUBAID/Financial-Document-RAG-Assistant

title: Ask HN: Flag/gray out comments complaining about AI/LLM use in posts/comments?
description:
It's getting tedious. Predictably devolves into "How do you know it's AI/LLM?" & "I know because of these tells..."Reminds me of years past and constant litany of complaints about paywalls. Such comments have for the most part disappeared.
